text1: The 42nd Fleet is a relatively new faction made up of a few allied planet’s veteran forces.

The Type 1 MAC is the smallest of the 42nd Fleet's coilguns; firing a tungsten rod using a series of magnetic coils, the sheer kinetic energy of a single rod is capable of destroying smaller targets outright.

The Type 2 MAC is the intermediate coilgun of the 42nd Fleet; firing a tungsten rod using a series of magnetic coils, the sheer kinetic energy of a single rod is capable of destroying smaller targets outright.

The Type 3 MAC is the largest coilgun of the 42nd Fleet; firing a massive tungsten rod using a series of magnetic coils, the sheer kinetic energy of a single rod is capable of destroying smaller targets outright.
The Type 10 Multiple Launch Rocket System carries 200 short-range ship-to-ship missiles meant to overwhelm.
The Type 9 MLRS is the Type 10’s little brother. It has less range and half the missiles. Still serviceable but not as potent.

The Thuban-class is a Frigate built around its massive Type 1 Magnetic Accelerator Cannon meant to compensate for its lack of weapons. Primarily meant for Picket Fleets, boasting a high speed and just enough mounts for point defence but otherwise subpar.
